data.title: W. R. Berkley Corporation Names Christopher T. Reichardt President of Berkley Oil & Gas
data.description: In Greenwich, Conn., W. R. Berkley Corporation (NYSE: WRB) has named Christopher T. Reichardt as the new president of Berkley Oil & Gas, succeeding Linda A. Eppolito, who is now the chair of the business. The appointments are effective immediately. With over 20 years of experience in the oil and gas insurance sector, Reichardt spent more than 15 years at Berkley Oil & Gas and previously held the position of senior vice president and chief before this promotion.

data.title: Starwood Property Trust Announces Date for First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: In Miami Beach, Florida, on April 16, 2026, Starwood Property Trust (NYSE: STWD) revealed plans to disclose its Q1 2026 financial outcomes on May 8, 2026, before the New York Stock Exchange opens. There will be a conference call following the release.

data.title: Select Water Solutions Announces Quarterly Cash Dividend of $0.07 Per Share
data.description: In Gainesville, Texas on April 16, 2026, Select Water Solutions, Inc. (NYSE: WTTR) disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend. Select is a prominent supplier of sustainable water and chemical solutions to the energy sector. The specific dividend amount or additional details were not provided in the announcement.

data.title: Marine Products Corporation Announces Date for First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: In Atlanta on April 16, 2026, Marine Products Corporation (NYSE: MPX) revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the first quarter concluding on March 31, 2026 on Thursday, May 7, 2026, prior to market launch. Marine Products Corporation operates as...

data.title: CNO Financial Group to Release First Quarter Results on April 30, 2026
data.description: CARMEL, Indiana - On April 16, 2026, CNO Financial Group, Inc. (NYSE: CNO) announced that they will be releasing their first quarter 2026 results after the market closes on Thursday, April 30, 2026. Following this, they will be conducting a conference call to address and discuss these results at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time on Friday, May 1, 2026. This call is anticipated to provide insights into the company's performance during this quarter and will be open to investors, analysts, and the media.

data.title: APAA Applauds 10% Increase in Domestic Aluminum Production at Century Mt. Holly Due to Trump's National Security Tariffs
data.description: A recent announcement from the American Primary Aluminum Association (APAA) hails the decision made by Century Aluminum to recommence operations at an inactive potline situated in their Mt. Holly smelter in Goose Creek, South Carolina. This move has involved a substantial financial commitment, with a noteworthy investment of $65 million in the domestic aluminum industry.

data.title: MGP Ingredients to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on Wednesday, April 29, 2026
data.description: ATCHISON, Kan.--MGP Ingredients, Inc., a prominent company in branded and distilled spirits as well as food ingredient solutions, is set to disclose its first quarter 2026 financial results before the Nasdaq market opens on Wednesday, April 29. President and CEO Julie Francis, along with CFO Brandon Gall, will lead a conference call at 10 a.m. ET on the same day to review the results, offer a business overview, and address inquiries. To participate, please visit th...

data.title: loanDepot, Inc. to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 5, 2026
data.description: loanDepot, Inc., based in Irvine, California, announced that they will be releasing their financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on May 5, 2026. The company has scheduled this report to provide insights into their performance during this period. This update is eagerly anticipated by investors and analysts who are keen to assess loanDepot's financial health and growth. It signifies an important milestone for the company as stakeholders look to evaluate the organization's progress and future prospects.

data.title: Fair Isaac Corporation Announces Date for Reporting of Second Quarter Fiscal 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Global analytics software leader FICO, listed on the NYSE under the symbol FICO, is set to report its financial results for the second quarter of fiscal year 2026 on April 28, 2026, post market closure. A conference call is scheduled for the same day at 4:30 p.m. Eastern time, with alternative timings for other time zones – 3:30 p.m. Central and 1:30 p.m. Pacific. Interested parties can access the webcast of the call on FICO’s investor website at www.fico.com/investors. For those unable to join the live call, a replay will be accessible on the Event Calendar under Past Events until April 28, 2027.

data.title: Ambience Healthcare Unveils Platform Roadmap to Rebuild Healthcare with AI
data.description: Ambience Healthcare, a prominent intelligence platform for clinical documentation and revenue integrity, has introduced a comprehensive platform roadmap aimed at revolutionizing healthcare delivery through AI. The multiyear roadmap, created in partnership with top academic medical centers in the country, was revealed at Ambience's first Apex Summit on April 13 in Chicago. This initiative is set to transform how health systems provide and enhance care using artificial intelligence technology.

data.title: Inseego Corp. to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 7, 2026
data.description: San Diego-based Inseego Corp. (Nasdaq: INSG) disclosed they will unveil their financial outcomes for Q1 of 2026, concluding on March 31, 2026, post-market closure on May 7, 2026. The company, renowned for its expertise in 5G mobile broadband and 5G fixed wireless access solutions, operates globally.

data.title: Vitesse Energy Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call
data.description: Vitesse Energy, Inc. announced that it will release its first quarter 2026 financial and operating results on May 4, 2026, after the market closes. They will also hold a conference call on May 5, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The call can be accessed via phone or the Company’s webcast. Key details for the event are as follows: Date of Conference Call: May 5, 2026. Please note the Company’s stock symbol on the NYSE is VTS.

data.title: LifeStance to Host First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call on May 7, 2026
data.description: On April 16, 2026, in Scottsdale, Arizona, LifeStance Health Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: LFST), a leading outpatient mental health care provider in the U.S., announced that they will be releasing their earnings report for the first quarter of 2026 on Thursday, May 7, 2026, before the market opens. LifeStance Health Group, Inc. is known as one of the largest providers of mental health care services in the country.

data.title: Applied Optoelectronics Announces Date of First Quarter 2026 Financial Results Conference Call
data.description: Applied Optoelectronics, Inc. (NASDAQ: AAOI), a top supplier of cutting-edge optical and HFC networking solutions fueling AI technologies, made a public statement from Sugar Land, Texas, on April 16, 2026. They revealed their plan to disclose the financial outcomes of the first quarter, concluding on March 31, 2026, on Thursday, May 7, 2026.

data.title: Blaize and NeoTensr Enter into Contract for Up to $50M to Deploy Co-Branded AI Edge Data Center Infrastructure Across Asia Pacific
data.description: In El Dorado Hills, California, Blaize Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: BZAI, Nasdaq: BZAIW) and NeoTensr have revealed a collaboration to work on a co-branded AI edge data center infrastructure project in the Asia Pacific region. The contract is valued at up to $50.0 million. Blaize, known for its energy-efficient AI computing solutions, and NeoTensr, a hardware and software system integrator, aim to tap into the expanding compute market in the region. This joint venture signifies a major development in the industry.

data.title: FEDERAL RESERVE APPROVES MERGER THAT WILL LEAD TO GROWTH OF M C BANK
data.description: The anticipated merger between DMMS Purchaser, Inc. and MC Bancshares is set to finalize on May 1, 2026 in New Orleans and Atlanta. This agreement involves the acquisition of MC Bancshares, Inc., the parent company of M C Bank & Trust Company. The announcement was made jointly by the two companies.

data.title: Alcoa Corporation Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Alcoa Corporation (NYSE: AA; ASX: AAI) announced their financial results for the first quarter of 2026, showing increased profitability due to higher aluminum prices. In Q1 2026, the company reported a revenue of $3.193 billion compared to $3.449 billion in Q4 2025 and $3.369 billion in Q1 2025. The net income attributable to Alcoa Corporation was $425 million in Q1 2026, $213 million in Q4 2025, and $548 million in Q1 2025. Earnings per common share were $1.60 in Q1 2026, $0.80 in Q4 2025, and $2.07 in Q1 2025. The results indicate a positive trend in profitability for Alcoa Corporation in the first quarter of 2026.

data.title: CENTURY 21 Brand Unveils Next Chapter of "Joy of Home" with New Campaign Celebrating the Color--And Emotion--of Finding Home
data.description: In Madison, New Jersey on April 16, 2026, CENTURY 21 Real Estate LLC introduced "Joy of Home: Chapter 2," through a national advertising campaign. This initiative aims to shift focus onto the core values that are significant in the realm of real estate.

data.title: Reed Hastings to step down as Netflix board chairman.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the number of COVID-19 cases in the country has reached over 200,000, with a significant increase in the past week. Health officials are concerned about the rising number of hospitalizations, which have now surpassed 15,000. The death toll from the virus stands at more than 3,000. Despite efforts to contain the spread through vaccination campaigns and public health measures, the situation remains critical. Authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines and get vaccinated to help curb the escalating crisis.
